release_summary: Empirical past-ADP survival curve. Replaces v2.2.0's flat 5%/pick sniper rate (which underestimated faller risk by ~3x) with a 2D hazard table calibrated on 12,100,350 BBM5 picks. Bucketed by (ADP tier x picks-relative-to-ADP): T4_deep hazard goes 8.8% at ADP -> 11.3% just past -> 13.1% past -> 15.4% far past -> 16.6% way past, matching the empirically observed accelerating hazard. Net effect: the GONE badge now correctly fires on ALL contested players (not just pre-ADP ones). On Chris's R12 P136 case: Higgins probAvail drops 0.77->0.42 (now flagged GONE), Coker 0.77->0.51 (now GONE), Shaheed 0.43->0.60 (less alarmist). recScores barely move (max delta +0.52 -> well within ship tolerance, no refit needed). v2.1.13 _qualityMult + v2.2.0 chain accumulators compose correctly: Hunter rank 165 at pick 137 stays at #8 score=1.4 (effectively buried). New knob: survival_curve_mode (0=legacy logistic+sniper, 1=empirical). Shipped at mode=1 across all 15 contests.
